title: Why 'Uyaynah b. Musa b. Ka'b Renounced His Allegiance
description: His Allegiance It has been said that the reason for his renunciation of allegiance was as follows:371 Al-Musayyab b. Zuhayr was the deputy to Musa b. Ka`b as prefect of police, and when Musa died'372 alMusayyab took over the full office of his duties with the police forces. Fearing that al-Mansur would write to cUyaynah about 370. Al-Sind was the province surrounding the lower reaches of the Indus River; it covers roughly the same area as the modern Pakistani province of Sind. Ell, s.v. (T. W. Haig). 371.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
